versions.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install kagent-crds oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=kagent-crds:0.3.13" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install kagent oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=kagent:0.3.13" \
  -n kcm-system
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   kagent-crds-0-3-13              true
# kcm-system   kagent-0-3-13                   true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: kagent
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: kagent-crds-0-3-13
      name: kagent-crds
      namespace: kagent
    - template: kagent-0-3-13
      name: kagent
      namespace: kagent
      dependsOn:
      - name: kagent-crds
        namespace: kagent
